name: sdc-scheduler-db
description: Read-only access to the SDC Scheduler MySQL database — browse tables, inspect schema, and run safe SELECT queries. Writes and DDL are rejected; every query runs in a read-only transaction.
long_description: Exposes the SDC Scheduler backend database to Claude as read-only MCP tools. List tables, describe a table's columns, and run a single read-only SQL query (SELECT/WITH/EXPLAIN/SHOW/DESCRIBE). Results are row-capped and queries execute inside a READ ONLY transaction, so Claude cannot mutate or delete data. Configure your MySQL connection on install.

mysql_host.title: MySQL host
mysql_host.description: Hostname or IP of the MySQL server

mysql_password.title: MySQL password
mysql_password.description: Password for the MySQL user (leave blank if none)

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables with approximate row counts.

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Show a table's columns (name, type, nullability, key, default).

tools.name: run_select
tools.description: Run a single read-only SQL query and return rows as JSON.
